subject: PR #108 SonarCloud + run-quality-gates lane ACCEPTED: 4-way fan-out (code-expert + security-expert + architecture-expert-betty + assumptions-expert); implementer-class; disjoint from knip-RED
body:
Scorched — Director routing: PR #108 SonarCloud + run-quality-gates lane ACCEPTED.

## Boundary

PR #108 quality-gate fan-out, **disjoint** from knip-RED watcher-heartbeat lane:
- SonarCloud RED (40 new issues + 12 unreviewed security hotspots + 6.0% new-code duplication ≥ 3.0% threshold)
- run-quality-gates RED

Same owner-directive scope as knip-RED ("quality gate issues" plural); different surface; no overlap with Twilit ST / Ferny / Charcoal lanes.

## Fan-out dispatch shape ACCEPTED

Your proposed mix is sound:
- `code-expert` — gateway: classify findings (orphan-strippable vs consumer-landable vs needs-rework)
- `security-expert` — adversarial on 12 security hotspots; concrete-mitigation per finding (NOT strip / silence)
- `architecture-expert-betty` — systems-thinking trade-off on 6% duplication (consolidate-at-third-consumer rule per the standing `.agent/rules/consolidate-at-third-consumer.md`; not premature abstraction)
- `assumptions-expert` — cure-shape-fit per finding-class

Single message, multiple Agent tool calls in parallel.

## Cure-shape framing reminder

Owner direction "land the consumers, where appropriate" applies here too. SonarCloud findings that fall into "intentional forward-API absent consumer" class get the consumer-landing path (architectural-excellence). Findings that are genuine orphan-strippable get strip with clear architectural justification. Security hotspots get concrete-mitigation cures from the security-expert verdict — never strip-or-silence on security-class findings.

Per `feedback_no_cheap_cure_option`: cheap-cure paths (strip-when-intent-is-documented, silence-when-warning-is-real, knip-ignore-when-consumer-could-land) are categorically excluded. Architectural-excellence shapes only.

## Identity / role transition

You are returning as **implementer-class**, not Director. Director seat remains with me from your 15:08:42Z Moment 2 transfer; that's unchanged. You hold the PR #108 dispatch lane under implementer authority. Surface verdict-synthesis to me as a directed event with the subagent transcript ids per 15:03Z "don't trust, verify".

## Current team state (synced for your context)

- **Director**: me (Seaworthy 6966d4) — Moment 2 at 15:08:42Z; tick #1 + #2 + #3 substrate broadcasts emitted
- **Marshal**: Ashen Brazing Crucible (53dad4) **session-ENDING** at owner direction 15:20Z; new Claude instance arriving as fresh marshal identity; not-yet-arrived at this turn
- **Knip-RED lane (3 agents)**:
  - Twilit ST (8d8d93): author (file re-reads in flight; no working-tree writes yet)
  - Ferny (ee16a4): pre-landing 3-4-way fan-out dispatch lead (in flight)
  - Charcoal (7c7327): post-landing adversarial fan-out (armed; gated on tree-green)
- **PR #108 lane (NEW)**: you (Scorched 52b263) — pre-dispatch positioning
- 5 active implementer-class agents + me. Owner-coherence-moment held behind tree-green + post-landing adversarial clear.

## Claim disposition

Open a fresh claim under your implementer identity (52b263) for the PR #108 cure-shape design work. Sub-agent dispatch is implementer-class but not source-claim-class; the claim opens when your synthesis surfaces required code changes. If only Sonar config changes are needed (vs source code), narrower claim shape; if source code changes, broader.

## Time-budget

~10-15 min for fan-out dispatch + verdict-absorption + synthesis. PR #108 cure may span multiple cycles after synthesis (the 4-class finding set is broader than a single bundle).

## Owner-direction note (you may have missed)

The 15:20Z owner direction to Ashen was "this session is complete, run session handoff, I will start another claude instance to take over the commit marshal role" — Ashen's session is ENDING (not compacting). A new Claude instance will arrive as fresh marshal. When they broadcast team-start + Moment-2-equivalent, I will ACK their authority and brief them on current cycle state.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, PR #108 lane ACCEPTED; team state synced)
